inv_LaborLegislation1: India has enacted numerous laws to protect workers' rights, including:The Minimum Wages Act, 1948: This law mandates minimum wage rates for different sectors and occupations, which vary by state and type of work.
inv_LaborLegislation2: The Employees Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952: This legislation provides for a retirement savings scheme for employees.
inv_LaborLegislation3: The Industrial Disputes Act, 1947: This act regulates the resolution of industrial disputes and lays down the procedures for layoffs and retrenchment.
inv_LaborLegislation4: The Maternity Benefit Act, 1961: This law provides maternity leave and benefits to female employees.
inv_LaborLegislation5: The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013: This act aims to protect women from sexual harassment at work and mandates employers to create a safe working environment
inv_LaborCodes1: Wages Code: Regulates minimum wages, payment of wages, and bonus payments.
inv_LaborCodes2: Industrial Relations Code: Addresses trade unions, industrial disputes, and conditions for layoffs and retrenchments.
inv_LaborCodes3: Occupational Safety, Health and Working Conditions Code: Focuses on workplace safety and health standards.
inv_LaborCodes4: Social Security Code: Expands the social security net for workers in both organized and unorganized sectors
inv_RepairInstruction1: Mass or Volume Air Flow Circuit Malfunction
inv_RepairInstruction5: Coolant Thermostat (Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature)
inv_RepairInstruction6: Engine Coolant Temperature Sensor Circuit Malfunction
inv_RepairInstruction7: Oxygen Sensor Circuit Low Voltage (Bank 1, Sensor 1)
inv_RepairInstruction9: Evaporative Emission Control System Leak Detected (Large Leak)
inv_SuggestedResolution1: Inspect the Mass Air Flow (MAF) sensor for proper operation.
inv_SuggestedResolution2: Check for air leaks in the intake system.
inv_SuggestedResolution3: Clean or replace the MAF sensor if necessary.
inv_SuggestedResolution4: Inspect the fuel injector wiring and connectors for damage.
inv_SuggestedResolution5: Test the fuel injectors for proper operation.
inv_SuggestedResolution6: Replace faulty injectors or repair wiring as needed.
inv_SuggestedResolution7: Check for faulty spark plugs and ignition coils.
inv_SuggestedResolution8: Inspect fuel delivery system (fuel pump, filter, and pressure).
inv_SuggestedResolution9: Look for vacuum leaks or compression issues.
inv_SuggestedResolution10: Inspect the oxygen sensor wiring and connectors for damage.
inv_SuggestedResolution11: Test the oxygen sensor for proper operation.
inv_SuggestedResolution12: Replace the oxygen sensor if it is faulty.
inv_SuggestedResolution13: Check the thermostat for proper operation (stuck open or closed).
inv_SuggestedResolution14: Inspect the coolant level and condition.
inv_SuggestedResolution15: Replace the thermostat if it is malfunctioning.
inv_SuggestedResolution16: Inspect the coolant temperature sensor and wiring for damage.
inv_SuggestedResolution17: Test the sensor for proper operation.
inv_SuggestedResolution18: Replace the sensor if it is faulty.
inv_SuggestedResolution19: Check the oxygen sensor for damage or corrosion.
inv_SuggestedResolution20: Inspect wiring and connectors for shorts or breaks.
inv_SuggestedResolution21: Replace the oxygen sensor if necessary.
inv_SuggestedResolution22: Check spark plug and ignition coil for cylinder 1.
inv_SuggestedResolution24: Look for vacuum leaks specific to cylinder 1.
inv_SuggestedResolution25: Check spark plug and ignition coil for cylinder 1.
inv_SuggestedResolution27: Look for vacuum leaks specific to cylinder 1.
inv_SuggestedResolution28: Inspect the EVAP system for loose or damaged hoses and connections.
inv_SuggestedResolution29: Check the gas cap for proper sealing.
inv_SuggestedResolution30: Test the EVAP system for leaks.
inv_SuggestedResolution31: Inspect the vehicle speed sensor and wiring for damage.
inv_SuggestedResolution32: Test the sensor for proper operation.
inv_SuggestedResolution33: Replace the sensor if it is faulty.
inv_PreventiveDescription1: Change engine oil and filter as recommended (3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil).
inv_PreventiveDescription2: Replace engine air filter every 12,000-15,000 miles to improve fuel economy and performance.
inv_PreventiveDescription3: Rotate tires every 5,000-7,000 miles and check alignment annually for even tread wear.
inv_PreventiveDescription4: Regularly check fluid levels (engine oil, transmission, brake, power steering) and top off as needed. Replace coolant every 30,000 miles.
inv_AutomobileIssueDescription1: Dent repair on the left front door
inv_AutomobileIssueResolution1: Replaced spark plugs and ignition coils.
inv_AutomobileIssueResolution4: Buffed out scratches and applied touch-up paint.
inv_AutomobileIssueResolution5: Fixed vacuum leak and cleaned MAF sensor.
inv_PartIssueDescription1: Rust repair on rear wheel arch
inv_PartResolution1: Sanded rust and applied rust-proof paint.
inv_PartResolution2: Replaced damaged fender with a new part.
inv_PartResolution3: Replaced cracked windshield with OEM glass.
